title: swainsona pterostylis
intro: Swainsona pterostylis, also known as the desert donkey orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family. It has been traditionally used in Aboriginal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Swainsona pterostylis may be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, but its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity and should only be used under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional.
